pdf.source: First Alert 4 / KSDK News — Grafton Business Damage Reports
pdf.excerpt: Back roof completely removed. Second roof section on opposite side of building also completely gone. Recently constructed covered patio deck structure dislodged by tornado winds and thrown across Main Street, crashing through a wooden deck and into Dees Riverside Retreat. Roof over smoker and kitchen equipment blown off. Remaining attached roof has multiple leaks. Numerous windows busted from debris. Interior exposed to elements.

findings.recommendation: Building is unusable. Arrange structural engineering assessment before re-entry.
